title: EllipseAngle Property
description: Specifies angle of the ellipse which is the inspection base line of ArcInspector.
notes:
EllipseAngle is used to specify angle of the ellipse when the ellipse is specified as the base line for ArcInspector.

See Also: EllipseAngle Property
